title: rhododendron minimifolium
intro: Rhododendron minimifolium, also known as the dwarf rhododendron or small-leaf rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family (Ericaceae) characterized by its small leaves and showy pink or white flowers. Traditionally, the leaves of Rhododendron minimifolium have been used in herbal medicine due to their antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce swelling. Rhododendron minimifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also sometimes used in folk remedies and traditional medicine.
